descriptors.d: Reflects on luck and ideas as partly spiritual
descriptors.e: uncertain about origins of ideas and success

descriptors.d: Values hard work and timing in success
descriptors.e: believes effort influences luck and impact
focuses on shoes, water, vision projects

descriptors.d: Suggests sustainability and green energy as future focus
Expresses humility about expertise in new fields
descriptors.e: admits limited experience in green energy
sees challenges as chances for innovation

factual_points: Blake Mycoskie credits luck and ideas for success
He started on a farm in Argentina
His ventures include shoes, water, and vision projects
He advocates for green energy and sustainability
He feels fortunate to have brought ideas to life
He believes technology is key to solving climate issues
caution_flags: Quotes are paraphrased, not direct speech
Focuses on personal beliefs, not verified facts
Some statements are speculative about future trends
Limited context on specific projects or outcomes
title: TOMS Founder Blake Mycoskie on leading with authenticity  - Haas News | UC Berkeley Haas
